_meta.description: Curated list of SEDA-registered PV service providers (RPVSP) for SuriaSnap.
_meta.source: Compiled from the providers' own public websites. SEDA's authoritative RPVSP directory is login-gated at https://www.seda.gov.my/directory/registered-pv-service-provider-directory/ and cannot be browsed publicly, so this is a verified subset — not the complete registry.
_meta.disclaimer: Always confirm a provider's current SEDA registration on the official directory before signing any contract.

installers.name: Solarvest Energy
installers.blurb: Public-listed solar EPCC. Residential rooftop via its PowerVest home arm.

installers.name: Solaroo Energy
installers.blurb: Home-solar specialist offering end-to-end NEM installation and financing.

installers.name: Pekat Solar (Pekat Group)
installers.blurb: Public-listed solar & earthing group covering residential and C&I rooftop.

installers.name: Verdant Solar
installers.blurb: Residential-focused rooftop installer serving the Klang Valley and Peninsular Malaysia.

installers.name: ERS Energy
installers.blurb: Turnkey solar EPCC for homes and businesses.

installers.name: Plus Solar
installers.blurb: Award-winning C&I and residential solar provider.

installers.name: SOLS Energy
installers.blurb: Residential solar social enterprise with a strong home-install focus.

installers.name: Samaiden
installers.blurb: Public-listed renewable-energy EPCC and consultancy.

installers.name: Ditrolic Solar
installers.blurb: One of Malaysia's largest solar EPCCs; residential via Ditrolic Home.

installers.name: GSPARX (TNB Group)
installers.blurb: TNB Group's solar arm; residential rooftop with rent-to-own options.

installers.name: Cypark Renewable Energy
installers.blurb: Public-listed renewable-energy and large-scale solar developer.

installers.name: Sunview Group
installers.blurb: Public-listed solar EPCC (Fabulous Sunview) serving homes and businesses.

installers.name: Solar Sunyield
installers.blurb: Ipoh-based installer for homes and businesses across Perak and the Klang Valley.

installers.name: Brilliant Solar
installers.blurb: SEDA-registered installer with a Klang Valley HQ and a Penang (Butterworth) branch.

installers.name: Solana Tec
installers.blurb: Residential solar specialist serving Johor and Melaka.

installers.name: Proksi Solar
installers.blurb: Johor Bahru-based solar installer for homes and businesses.

installers.name: Guide Solar (Guide Engineering)
installers.blurb: Kuching-based solar PV and electrical engineering provider for Sarawak.

installers.name: BSL Eco Energy
installers.blurb: Sabah-based solar EPCC, also operating in the Klang Valley.

installers.name: Renosun
installers.blurb: 14-year northern specialist (400+ installs); 80%+ of projects in Kedah, Perlis and Penang.

installers.name: Arus EnerG
installers.blurb: Kota Bharu-based SEDA-certified solar installer; billed as the largest Bumiputera solar provider in Malaysia.

installers.name: Alpha Solar
installers.blurb: East-coast specialist with a Kuantan HQ; also in Penang, Johor and Selangor.

installers.name: Trexon Energy
installers.blurb: Malaysia's first app-based solar platform; serves all major states including east-coast Terengganu.

installers.name: Progressture Power (Progressture Solar)
installers.blurb: Southeast Asia-focused EPCC solar developer and RPVI; holds SEDA RPVSP, RPVI, and G7 CIDB licence. Serves residential rooftops through to utility-scale farms; also offers battery storage, EV charging, PPAs, and sustainability consulting.

installers.name: Milieu Solar
installers.blurb: Award-winning EPCC solar provider (2000+ projects, 80 MWp delivered since 2021); Golden Bull Award 2024 winner. Covers residential, commercial, and industrial rooftop installations nationwide.

installers.name: Northern Solar
installers.blurb: Publicly-listed (ACE Market 2025) solar EPCC specialist with strong northern-Malaysia roots. Penang branch in Bukit Mertajam; covers Penang, Perak, Kedah, Perlis, and expanding into Sabah.

installers.name: Jesselton Solar Services
installers.blurb: Self-described largest solar PV contractor in Sabah. Full EPCC, solar design, electrical works up to 132 kV, and long-term maintenance for residential, commercial, and industrial clients across Sabah.

installers.name: Mestron Energy
installers.blurb: Subsidiary of Mestron Holdings Berhad; holds both RPVSP and RPVI registrations with SEDA. Covers solar, biogas, hydro, and energy-efficiency projects for residential and commercial clients nationwide.
